identityTopics.insight: Participants were more accurate about their prior understanding of Caste.
Participants were more accurate about their prior understanding of Gender.
Participants were more accurate about their prior understanding of Religion.

creativePedagogy.insight: Creative pedagogies generated strong learning impact across the cohort.

problemSolving.insight: Problem-solving confidence increased through practical workshop exercises.

misconceptionInsights.title: Caste perception shift
misconceptionInsights.description: Participants' retrospective view aligned closely with their understanding of Caste.

misconceptionInsights.title: Gender perception shift
misconceptionInsights.description: Participants' retrospective view aligned closely with their understanding of Gender.

misconceptionInsights.title: Religion perception shift
misconceptionInsights.description: Participants' retrospective view aligned closely with their understanding of Religion.

learningGainInsights.title: Caste learning gain
learningGainInsights.description: 0.9 points of measured learning gain after the workshop.

learningGainInsights.title: Gender learning gain
learningGainInsights.description: 0.5 points of measured learning gain after the workshop.

learningGainInsights.title: Religion learning gain
learningGainInsights.description: 0.7 points of measured learning gain after the workshop.

educatorInsights: Participants initially overestimated their understanding of gender.
Intervention Planning generated the highest learning impact.
It was in our knowledge that we have to present our problems and all the research. But was the most common teamwork challenge.
Facilitator feedback points to a strong, safe learning environment with room for more reflective practice.
